## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 18, 2026 - Jun 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Irislene Oliveira Silva_, Jun 19, 2026, 1/5: "There are a lot of bugs. The app has good stories and a beautiful interface, but it crashes frequently and sometimes stops responding, making reading difficult. It has potential, but needs more stability and optimization to offer a better experience."
            2. _Nayara iasmin marques da silva santos_, Jun 18, 2026, 4/5: "This app is completely horrible with each update it only gets worse, lots of bugs, chat is in other languages, they don't say anything and don't follow the script, I've been editing the app, it fixed all the bugs, the app is perfect again, but it started to crash out of nowhere and is inaccessible"
